name: Argo Global Listed Infrastructure Limited
analysis: ALI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5600, stop A$2.3958, target A$3.0526 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
